title: hieracium paurophyllum
intro: Hieracium paurophyllum, also known as the Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium paurophyllum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Hieracium paurophyllum include tea infusions and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
